# lens-work.new-feature (Compatibility Stub)

> **This is a backward-compatible alias.** Load and execute the current Lens Next prompt from the release module.

```
Read and follow all instructions in: lens.core/_bmad/lens-work/prompts/lens-init-feature.prompt.md
```

Always ask the user to choose the feature track explicitly before creation. Do not silently apply a default or inferred track.
